title: 3 Pcs Black Wire Fruit Baskets, Wide Metal Fruit Bowls 27x12cm Large Wire Storage Baskets for Kitchen Counter, Home Decor, Table Centerpiece
features: Large Capacity: This set includes 3pcs black wire fruit baskets, each measuring approximately 26.5x12.2 cm. They offer ample space for easily storing fruits and vegetables, meeting your household's daily needs and adding convenience to your home life.

Durable Metal Material: Made with strong metal wire and a sturdy base, the fruit bowls offer excellent load-bearing capacity, durability, and resistance to deformation. The painted surface is rust-resistant and corrosion-resistant, making them suitable for long-term daily use

Good Ventilation: The wide opening and woven wire structure create natural ventilation, allowing air to circulate freely, helping to maintain the freshness of fruits and vegetables and extend their shelf life.

Multi-Purpose Use: The wire baskets can be used not only as fruit baskets but also for storing and displaying vegetables, bread, pastries, snacks, and sundries, making them an essential home storage tool.

Stylish and Minimalist Appearance: The classic black color and minimalist geometric design blend effortlessly into any home decor, making them the perfect decorative addition to your dining table, kitchen, or gathering space, adding a touch of style.
